auditPolicy: Hard limits (CDSI absolute min/max ages, allowable intervals) are enforced strictly. CDSI 'preferable' age windows that conflict with ACIP/CDC/AAP/immunize.org are resolved in favor of ACIP guidance — see memory/feedback_cdsi_vs_acip.md

cases.description: Dose 1: code starts at 2mo (ACIP recommended), CDSI absolute minimum is 38d (5.4w with grace)
cases.rationale: CDSI Pertussis Dose 1 absoluteMinAgeDays=38, minAgeDays=42 (6w), earliestRecAgeDays=60 (2mo). Code uses am>=2 (recommended start). Acceptable per ACIP.

cases.description: Dose 2: minimum interval from D1 = 28 days (4 weeks)
cases.rationale: CDSI Dose 2 prefInt minIntervalDays=28. Code matches.

cases.description: Dose 4 booster: minimum interval from D3 = 180 days; code uses 182 (26 weeks rounding)
cases.rationale: CDSI=180d, code=182d. Off-by-2-day rounding to 26 weeks. Acceptable.
CDSI Dose 5 minAgeDays=1460=48mo. Code line 114 fires at am>=48. Matches.

cases.description: Pentacel through 6y per ACIP (CDSI 'preferable' caps at 5y; ACIP allows through 6y — ACIP wins)

expect.policy: ACIP > CDSI preferable for age windows

cases.rationale: CDSI Pentacel preferable end age = 5y. ACIP/clinical practice allows through 6y. Per memory/feedback_cdsi_vs_acip.md, ACIP wins for non-hard-limit windows. CDSI 'allowable' has no end age, so the divergence is within CDSI's allowable bounds.

cases.description: Vaxelis (CVX 146) FDA-labeled doses 1-3 only — excluded from D4 booster brand list
cases.rationale: CDSI Dose 4 preferable list excludes Vaxelis. Code line 108 booster brands correctly exclude it.

cases.description: Pediarix (CVX 110) excluded from Dose 4 booster preferable list per CDSI
cases.rationale: CDSI Dose 4 preferable list excludes Pediarix. Code line 108 correctly excludes. Note: 48-83mo catch-up does include Pediarix per ACIP (DTAP-005 same logic).

cases.description: At age ≥7y (≥84mo), DTaP brands are skipped — switch to Tdap (Adacel/Boostrix)
cases.rationale: CDSI Pertussis doses 1-5 conditional skip: 'Dose is not required for those 7 years or older'. Code line 121-126 correctly switches to Tdap brands.

cases.description: Decennial Tdap/Td booster: 10y routine; 5y for tetanus-prone wound prophylaxis
cases.rationale: Routine: 10y (3652d) per ACIP. Wound prophylaxis: separate path uses 1826d (5y) when 'wound_prophylaxis' risk is set. CDSI's 180d absolute minimum is more permissive than even ACIP's 5y wound recommendation — CDSI is for emergency clinical scenarios with TIG, not routine wound prophylaxis.

cases.description: Wound prophylaxis path: minInt = 1826d (5 years, ACIP)
cases.rationale: When 'wound_prophylaxis' risk is set, decennial booster minInt drops to 1826d (5y) per ACIP wound management guidance. Status changes to 'risk-based'.
CDSI Pertussis Dose 10 minAgeDays=4015 (11y). Code line 342 fires at am 132-144.

summary.notes: DTAP-005 resolved as intentional ACIP-driven divergence. DTAP-009 split into routine (10y) + new wound-prophylaxis path (5y) — added 'wound_prophylaxis' risk condition + dual-path in recommendations.js.
